content: it's interesting how every ultra awakener in arc 1 is a woman (Jenkin is a girl since she's small, but same sentiment applies), and castor and pollux are The only male ultra awakeners we have. I don't know if it means anything but it is interesting I think
I thought I was the only one who noticed😭
Some people complained when Castor and Pollux dropped that Ultra should be exclusive to female characters

so thats why he has insight spamming, because ultra interacts with insights
